component.name: QR Studio
component.summary: Créer et personnaliser des codes QR
QRコードを作成・カスタマイズ
QR 코드 생성 및 맞춤 설정

description.p: QR Studio is a feature-rich QR code generator with a modern GTK4/libadwaita interface. Create customized QR codes for text, URLs, Wi-Fi credentials, vCards, calendar events, GPS locations, and SMS messages.

QR Studio ist ein funktionsreicher QR-Code-Generator mit moderner GTK4/libadwaita-Oberfläche. Erstellen Sie angepasste QR-Codes für Text, URLs, WLAN-Zugangsdaten, vCards, Kalendereinträge, GPS-Standorte und SMS.

ul.li: Multiple QR content types: Text, URL, Wi-Fi, vCard, Calendar, GPS, SMS
Customizable dot styles: Rounded, Square, Dots, Diamond, Custom shapes
Logo embedding with transparent background support
Gradient and solid color options for foreground, background, and frame
Frame styles with customizable corner radius
Background images with adjustable opacity
Built-in color picker (pipette) for screen color sampling
Interactive map for GPS coordinates (OpenFreeMap)
Export as PNG, SVG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, PDF
Import existing QR codes from images
Drag & drop support for images and files
9 interface languages

screenshot.caption: Main window with URL QR code

ul.li: Multiple QR content types
Customizable dot styles and colors
Logo embedding
Gradient support
Frame styles
Interactive map for GPS coordinates
Export as PNG, SVG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, PDF
Import existing QR codes
Color picker (pipette)
9 languages: de, en, es, fr, it, pt-br, ja, ko, zh-cn
